evals.prompt: 部署我的开发环境，包括 Agent Reach、GitHub CLI 和自动更新
evals.expected_output: Installs Agent Reach, GitHub CLI, sets up npm auto-updates with default schedule, shows status summary

evals.prompt: 安装 Agent Reach 并配置 GitHub 认证
evals.expected_output: Installs Agent Reach, installs and authenticates GitHub CLI, shows verification status

evals.prompt: 帮我设置定时更新 claude-code 和 codex，每天早上8点和晚上8点运行
evals.expected_output: Creates update script with both packages, sets up cron for 8:00 and 20:00, shows configuration
